# Arcane Scroll

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Rarity | Ancient |
| Class | Any |

## Description

Arcane Scroll is an Ancient Relic.

Upon pickup, add a random Rare Card to your Deck.

## Notes

### Sources

At the start of the run, can be offered by Neow.

## Update History

- **Early Access v0.98**
    - Added Arcane Scroll to the game.

## Strategy Notes
